products.name: AMICA CHIPS
pros: Highest ranking in Altroconsumo lab tests

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025‑12‑16 report lists AMICA CHIPS and CARREFOUR CLASSIC among the top‑rated patatine brands, indicating strong performance in lab tests. The evidence is older than 60 days.
